heroHeadline: Kyiv Strikes Russian Oil Refineries Despite Trump's Repeated Requests to Halt
heroSubtitle: Ukraine defies US pressure by striking Russian energy infrastructure as peace talks stall; Zelenskyy warns Middle East conflict could divert Western military support from Ukraine
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
